tooltipNotAvailable.message: Purchases from this region are currently not allowed.

countryListCustom.message: You can customize the countries you want to be displayed by adding them to this list. When you make changes to the list the default countries will be replaced. If you want to return to the default countries you can 'Reset default countries'. You can also view the country codes by clicking on 'Show country codes'.

tableCountryCodeInfo.message: It is important to indicate correctly the country code. This code is responsible for indicating the corresponding country and price.

contact.message: For any suggestions, problems or information, please contact me at

modalDesc.message: Select the country code and Ctrl+C / ⌘+C to copy value

saveChangesMessage.message: Options saved. Reload the page to see changes.

translations.message: If you want to view the extension in your language or if you have seen an error in the translation, please help me at:

exchangeShowCheck.message: Display price converter with current exchange rate (estimated prices*):

exchangeLocalRadio.message: Currency of the store where you are located (If the currency is USD, it will not be displayed)

exchangeInfo.message: Currency converter by @fawazahmed0. Currency date: .

exchangeDisclamer.message: *Final prices may vary depending on the conversion rate of the chosen payment method.

confirmResetWarning.message: Warning: Custom countries will be cleared.

confirmResetDesc.message: Are you sure you want to reset to default countries? The values of the custom countries table will be cleared.

clarification1.message: This extension does not use or collect any user data.

clarification2.message: The prices shown are directly retrieved from the GOG API, except for the estimated price.

clarification3.message: If you are connected from a VPN and one of the prices does not match the one indicated, make sure you are connected to the desired market. If you verify that the price is incorrect, please let me know with as much detail as possible: VPN used, market, screenshot, etc... and I will try to find out why the error occurs.

unsavedWarningMessage.message: Warning: You have unsaved configuration changes. Remember to click SAVE CHANGES to apply the changes. To see the changes on GOG, refresh the page.
